title: Let Me Craft This
description: Lets you craft the uncraftable. Adds logical crafting recipes to some otherwise uncraftable items.
body:
Adds a crafting recipe to otherwise uncraftable items. Currently adds:
- Saddle (1.21.6 recipe)
- Iron/Gold/Diamond Horse Armours (same as leather)
- Chain armour (using chains)
- Enchanted Golden Apple (using old recipe)
- Unpacking packed and blue ice

More will be added in the near future.
Compatible with [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)!
